200.description:
Linked albums across every configured media source (empty when
nothing is linked). An album whose source is currently
unreachable reports `assetCount: 0` rather than failing the list.

linkId.description: The Famlin-side link id — what the asset endpoints take.

provider.description: Which media source this album lives on.

401.description: Missing, invalid, expired, or revoked credential

403.description: You are not a member of this group
